summary.en: A platform-strategy reference for understanding network effects, core interactions, governance, openness, monetization, and how platforms compete with pipelines.
summary.zh: 一本平台战略参考书，帮助理解网络效应、核心交互、治理、开放性、变现，以及平台如何与传统管道型业务竞争。

recommendation.en: Use this when a case is not just a BMC but a multi-sided ecosystem. It clarifies what to inspect: sides, value units, matching, governance, trust, and monetization trade-offs.
recommendation.zh: 当一个案例不是单一 BMC，而是多边生态系统时，推荐用它作为阅读框架：看清平台各边、价值单元、匹配机制、治理、信任和变现取舍。

headline.en: The beginner bridge from company cases to platform mechanics
headline.zh: 从公司案例走向平台机制的桥梁

whyOpen.en: Open this when Uber, Airbnb, Visa, or CUDA feels like more than a normal value chain. It gives names to sides, core interactions, network effects, launch tactics, governance, and monetization.
whyOpen.zh: 当 Uber、Airbnb、Visa 或 CUDA 不像普通价值链时读它：它会命名平台各边、核心交互、网络效应、启动策略、治理和变现。

audience.en: Readers analyzing marketplaces, ecosystems, developer platforms, or payment networks.
audience.zh: 适合分析市场平台、生态系统、开发者平台或支付网络的读者。

firstSteps.en: Read chapters 1-4 before opening platform cases.
firstSteps.zh: 先读第 1-4 章，再打开平台案例。

firstSteps.en: Fill the Platform Ecosystem Map while reading: each chapter maps to a canvas area.
firstSteps.zh: 边读边填平台生态地图：每章都能落到画布上的一个区域。

outcomes.en: You can explain why a platform needs more than users: it needs repeatable interactions and governance.
outcomes.zh: 你能说明平台不只是需要用户，还需要可重复交互和治理。

practicePrompts.en: Which side of your platform would join first without the other side present?
practicePrompts.zh: 如果另一边还不存在，你的平台哪一边会先愿意加入？

sources.label: Geoffrey G. Parker, Marshall W. Van Alstyne & Sangeet Paul Choudary · Platform Revolution · W. W. Norton & Company · 2016
